response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, directly matching the required stack, plus proven AI-agent infrastructure work and deep testing/DevOps practices; his open-source leadership and cross-platform adaptability strongly align with the role’s emphasis on architecture, automation, and collaboration.
strengths: Strong full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with real-world scale
Proven experience in AI-agent development and internal tooling infrastructure
Deep DevOps and testing discipline with Docker, CI/CD, and multiple testing frameworks
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Extensive project history may suggest fragmentation, though evidence shows depth
